migration-v7.description: Rewrite the v6 entry-points consolidated in v7: wr-autocomplete/chips-input → wr-select; wr-time-picker/date-time-picker → wr-date-picker; wr-tooltip → wr-popover; wr-tree-select → wr-tree; wr-bottom-sheet → wr-drawer; wr-count-up-text → wr-count-up. Touches .html, .ts, and .scss files.
